objective: Diagnose why StrategyLearningInsight generation has stalled
background: Last StrategyLearningInsight was 7 days ago. The learning pipeline appears stalled, preventing strategy adaptation.
constraints: Do not manually insert fake insight records
Do not change learning thresholds without approval
Do not modify trading thresholds or strategy parameters
Do not require live broker connection
acceptance_tests: Root cause of insight generation failure identified and documented
At least 1 new StrategyLearningInsight generated after fix (or confirmed blocked by data)
required_outputs: Root cause of insight generation failure identified and documented
At least 1 new StrategyLearningInsight generated after fix (or confirmed blocked by data)
forbidden_changes: Do not manually insert fake insight records
Do not change learning thresholds without approval
handoff_questions: Did you verify each acceptance criterion with evidence?
